clips.title: Genesis
clips.description: New organisms enter a harsher world with larger bodies and sharper senses.

clips.title: First Divergence
clips.description: Genetic drift produces the first distinct species.

clips.title: Radiation
clips.description: 27 species coexist in distinct ecological niches.

clips.title: Generational Shift
clips.description: Hundreds of generations have refined neural networks and body plans.

clips.title: Late Radiation
clips.description: A late wave of speciation produces 22 species.

clips.title: Balance
clips.description: The ecosystem reaches a dynamic equilibrium.

clips.title: Deep Time
clips.description: Generation 457. Complex body plans refined over thousands of generations.
